task_objective: Add CLI feature to run ProfileReport from command line
design_decisions: Used Click for the CLI interface.
Integrated with Ibis's native read functions (duckdb default).
Updated compatibility wrapper to match CLI features (theme, title, minimal).
Mandated /tmp/.venv location as per project protocol.
results: CLI successfully implemented and verified with tests. All protocol mandates (venv location, caching) followed.
